top4.label: Top 4 Teams
top4.description: Pick 4 teams you think will qualify for the playoffs.

runnerUp.label: Runner-Up
runnerUp.description: Who makes the final but doesn't win?

woodenSpoon.label: Wooden Spoon
woodenSpoon.description: Who finishes last in the table?

orangeCap.label: Orange Cap
orangeCap.description: Pick 3 batters who'll score the most runs. Partial credit for top-5 finishes.

purpleCap.label: Purple Cap
purpleCap.description: Pick 3 bowlers who'll take the most wickets. Partial credit for top-5 finishes.

mostSixes.label: Most Sixes
mostSixes.description: Pick 3 players who'll hit the most sixes. Partial credit for top-5 finishes.

locking.note: Season picks lock when the first match of IPL 2025 begins. No edits after lock.
